headlines: Circle unveils cirBTC, 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin with on‑chain reserve checks
CFTC and DOJ sue Illinois, Arizona and Connecticut to block state rules on prediction markets
Bitcoin holders face ~$600B in unrealized losses as price slips to ~$66K
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs post $173.7M outflow in latest session
SoFi launches institutional banking that combines fiat and crypto rails (supports SoFiUSD)

articles.title: Circle unveils cirBTC, 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin with on‑chain reserve checks
articles.summary: Circle (issuer of USDC) announced cirBTC — a new wrapped‑Bitcoin token backed 1:1 by native BTC and verifiable on‑chain, aimed at institutional and DeFi use. The token will launch first on Ethereum and Circle’s Arc chain and is positioned as a neutral, audit‑friendly BTC wrapper.

articles.title: CFTC and DOJ sue Illinois, Arizona and Connecticut to block state rules on prediction markets
articles.summary: The CFTC (backed by DOJ filings) sued three states arguing federal law preempts state gambling rules that try to restrict CFTC‑registered prediction markets such as Kalshi and Polymarket. The move aims to keep event contracts under federal commodity law and avoid a patchwork of state bans.

articles.title: Bitcoin holders face ~$600B in unrealized losses as price slips to ~$66K
articles.summary: On‑chain data show roughly 44% of circulating Bitcoin supply is trading below holders’ cost basis, leaving about $600 billion in unrealized losses — a sign of weak spot demand and broader market distribution pressure.

articles.title: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs post $173.7M outflow in the latest session
articles.summary: Data trackers reported a net outflow of about $173.7 million from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs in the most recent session, signaling that institutional ETF flows remain sensitive to short‑term market and macro moves.

articles.title: SoFi launches institutional banking platform that links fiat and crypto (supports SoFiUSD)
articles.summary: SoFi introduced an institutional 'Big Business Banking' product that combines fiat banking and crypto rails, allowing firms to hold, move and settle in fiat or crypto and to issue/redeem the SoFiUSD stablecoin inside a regulated banking stack.

articles.title: Wormhole faces large token unlock (≈600M W) that could add selling pressure
articles.summary: On‑chain trackers flagged a major Wormhole token unlock scheduled in early April (~600 million W tokens), a supply event that could create short‑term downward pressure and volatility for the cross‑chain protocol’s token.

articles.title: Stablecoins dominate trading volume as retail activity cools
articles.summary: Reports show stablecoins made up an outsized share of trading volume in Q1, reflecting a market where dollar‑pegged liquidity and institutional flows now fuel much of crypto turnover while retail spot activity lags.

articles.title: Bitcoin miner Soluna buys $53M wind farm to power AI and mining campus
articles.summary: Publicly traded miner Soluna closed a $53 million deal to acquire a wind farm in Texas it will use to power a new AI data center and mining campus — a continuation of miners pivoting to renewables and AI compute to diversify revenue.
